description_long: This is a simple, functional chair with a padded seat and backrest, both upholstered in a dark fabric. The chair features a sturdy, black metal frame with four straight legs, providing stability and durability. The seat and backrest are both slightly curved for ergonomic comfort, with the backrest attached to the frame by two vertical supports. There are no armrests, giving the chair a minimalist and versatile appearance suitable for various urban settings such as waiting areas, offices, or public spaces. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing comfort and practicality over decorative elements. The materials and construction suggest it is lightweight and easy to move.
description: A minimalist chair with a padded dark fabric seat and backrest, supported by a black metal frame with four legs and no armrests. Its simple, functional design is suitable for urban indoor environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved padded seat and backrest, with both vertical supports and all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest padding, as well as the slight backward angle of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the curved backrest and the two vertical supports connecting it to the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the seat and backrest profile and the leg structure.
